data.title: SEC Drops Enforcement Case Against Winklevoss-Founded Crypto Exchange Gemini
data.description:
The SEC has agreed to dismiss its enforcement case against Gemini after investors in its defunct lending program recovered their crypto assets in full.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/sec-drops-enforcement-case-against-winklevoss-founded-crypto-exchange-gemini/

data.title: Former Olympic Snowboarder Arrested in $60-Ton Cocaine Case That Used Crypto Laundering
data.description:
U. S. authorities have arrested Ryan James Wedding, a former Canadian Olympic snowboarder turned alleged cartel kingpin, bringing an end to a ten-year international manhunt that spanned multiple continents
source: https://www.ethnews.com/former-olympic-snowboarder-arrested-in-60-ton-cocaine-case-that-used-crypto-laundering/

data.title: Oklahoma introduces new bill focused on paying state employees and vendors in BTC
data.description:
Lawmakers in Oklahoma have submitted a new bill that will allow businesses and state employees to receive payments in Bitcoin.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/oklahoma-new-bill-paying-state-employees-btc/

data.title: Whale Transfers 1,999 ETH to Exchange Amid Potential Losses
data.description: A cryptocurrency whale has transferred 1,999 ETH, valued at $5.92 million, to an exchange. According to NS3.AI, this move comes after the whale initially purchased 6,411 ETH last year at approximately $3,873 each. Selling at current market prices could lead to a loss of around $1.8 million. Despite this transaction, the whale retains 3,803 ETH.

data.title: Sydney Huang launches Human API to connect AI systems with real-world human labor
data.description:
Human API launches as an agent-native platform enabling AI systems to hire humans for data collection and real-world tasks, starting with multilingual voice data.
source: https://catenaa.com/industries/technology/sydney-huang-launches-human-api-to-connect-ai-systems-with-real-world-human-labor/

data.title: This week, US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw a net outflow of $1.3241 billion, with no trading days experiencing net inflows.
data.description: According to Farside monitoring, US spot Bitcoin ETFs saw a net outflow of $1.3241 billion this week, with no net inflows on any trading day. Specifically: IBIT saw a net outflow of $537.5 million; FBTC a net outflow of $451.5 million; BITB a net outflow of $66.3 million; ARKB a net outflow of $76.2 million; EZBC a net outflow of $10.4 million; BRRR a net outflow of $3.8 million; HODL a net outflow of $6.3 million; and GBTC a net outflow of $172.1 million.

data.title: SEC Dismisses Civil Action Against Gemini in Crypto Lending Case
data.description:
The U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission has dismissed its civil enforcement action against Gemini Trust Company, LLC, with prejudice. The dismissal follows a joint stipulation filed today, ending the case tied to the Gemini Earn program
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2026/01/24/sec-dismisses-civil-action-against-gemini-in-crypto-lending-case/

data.title: Ethereum’s Vitalik Buterin urges cypherpunks to resist government and corporate encroachment
data.description:
Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin is urging cypherpunks to resist government and corporate encroachment, predicting that both seek more control and less trust.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereums-vitalik-buterin-urges-cypherpunks/

data.title: An address purchased 843 XAUT tokens today, worth $4.17 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, due to the gold price breaking through $5,000, an address (0x0a5e) bought 843 XAUT today, worth $4.17 million. This address deposited 7 million USDT into Bybit and subsequently withdrew 843 XAUT.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Elevates Post-Quantum Security to Core Engineering Priority
data.description:
The Ethereum Foundation has officially moved post-quantum (PQ) security from long-term research into active protocol engineering, making quantum resistance a top strategic priority for Ethereum’s 2026 roadmap. After several years of theoretical groundwork, the foundation is now accelerating concrete implementations aimed at protecting wallets, signatures, and consensus mechanisms before quantum computing reaches a disruptive threshold.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ethereum-foundation-elevates-post-quantum-security-to-core-engineering-priority/

data.title: Ethereum prepares for quantum era with new security team and funding
data.description:
Ethereum developers to launch biweekly sessions on quantum-resistant transactions as Foundation commits $2 million in new funding to harden core cryptography.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethereum-foundation-post-quantum-security-team?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Circle Reports Decrease in USDC Circulation Over Seven Days
data.description:
Circle has reported a significant change in the circulation of its USDC stablecoin over a recent seven-day period. According to PANews, official data indicates that by January 21, Circle issued approximately 4.8 billion USDC while redeeming around 6.2 billion USDC, resulting in a net decrease of about 1.4 billion USDC in circulation.

The total circulation of USDC stands at 74.4 billion coins, backed by reserves of approximately 74.5 billion USD. These reserves include about 47.8 billion USD in overnight reverse repurchase agreements, 16 billion USD in U.S. Treasury bills with maturities of less than three months, 9.9 billion USD in deposits with systemically important institutions, and around 800 million USD in other bank deposits.

data.title: Changpeng Zhao Says Bitcoin Could Break the Four-Year Cycle in 2026
data.description:
Speaking at the World Economic Forum in Davos on January 23, 2026, Binance founder Changpeng Zhao (CZ) said Bitcoin may be on the verge of breaking its long-standing four-year market cycle. According to CZ, structural changes in regulation, institutional demand, and global adoption could push Bitcoin into what he described as a potential “supercycle.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/changpeng-zhao-says-bitcoin-could-break-the-four-year-cycle-in-2026/

data.title: Jason, Product Manager of OKX Planet Community: It covers four major content platforms and has an incentive mechanism that everyone can participate in.
data.description: Jason, product manager of OKX Planet Community, stated at the OKX New Year's Eve dinner event that the OKX Planet Community has launched its public beta. This marks OKX's first comprehensive attempt at a community product, aiming to create a crypto community integrating information access, trading opportunity sharing, active creators, and a deep community. The community product encompasses four content platforms: public domain creation, public domain persona display, live streaming interaction, and private domain communities, providing continuous exposure and traffic conversion for creators and users through a recommendation page. Regarding incentives, Planet Community advocates for dynamic calculation based on key factors such as community user value, effective interaction between content consumers and creators, and community user engagement time. Jason emphasized that the community has a competitive weekly cash prize pool; the higher the community user stickiness and the more active the trading on OKX, the higher the incentives for creators. In the long term, Planet Community will gradually integrate with the OKX platform in terms of product, information, benefits, and ecosystem. For example, it will promote new community and trading features through X Layer. The goal in the short term is to focus on rapid iteration, expanding community operations and features, improving user experience, and ensuring that every user becomes an important part of the community's growth.
